title: D² messaging — subscriptions spec
description: Schema for contracts/mq-subscriptions/mq-subscriptions.spec.json — the source-of-truth catalog of every subscription D² services declare. DcsvIo.D2.Mq.SourceGen reads this to emit the MqSubscriptions static class (string constants) + the runtime registry (constant → MqSubscriptionDescriptor) into DcsvIo.D2.Messaging.Abstractions. Each entry pairs one consumer service's subscription with its target message type: queue name, pattern, binding, prefetch, idempotency, optional retry. The consuming service owns its entries.

constant.description: PascalCase identifier emitted as a const string under MqSubscriptions. Must be unique across all entries (D2MQ003).

messageType.description: Fully-qualified .NET type name of the message this subscription consumes. MUST match a messageType in mq-messages.spec.json (D2MQ007). Runtime resolver verifies the handler's TIn (BaseHandler<TSelf, TIn, Unit>) matches this type.

queueName.description: Queue name (lowercase, dot- or hyphen-separated). For pattern=FanoutExclusiveAutoDelete, this is treated as a PREFIX — a per-replica suffix is auto-appended at startup so multi-replica services don't conflict on the broker's exclusive-queue lock.

pattern.description: Queue topology pattern. CompetingConsumer = durable shared, exactly-once across replicas (events processed once). FanoutExclusiveAutoDelete = per-replica unique queue, every replica receives every message (cluster-wide broadcast — handlers MUST be idempotent). DurableShared = long-lived event stream that survives broker restart.

routingKeyBinding.description: AMQP routing-key BINDING pattern. Empty for fanout (binding has no key). For topic exchanges, may include AMQP wildcards: '*' (one segment) or '#' (zero or more segments). For direct, an exact match. Default is '' (fanout-style).

prefetch.description: Per-channel basic.qos prefetch count. Bounds in-flight unacked deliveries for this consumer. Defaults to 10 if omitted.

idempotency.description: When true, the consumer wraps the handler with a pre-check against the registered IMessageIdempotencyStore (default impl backed by IDistributedCache, 24h TTL). Defaults to false.

items.description: TimeSpan in HH:MM:SS form. e.g. '00:00:05' = 5 seconds.

tiers.description: TTL per retry tier. Length determines how many tier queues are declared.

maxAttempts.description: Hard cap on total delivery attempts before the message goes to DLQ with cause RETRIES_EXHAUSTED. Enforced via x-death header parsing on the consumer side.

tieredRetry.description: Optional broker-level tiered-retry topology. When omitted, handler failures go straight to DLQ.

deprecated.description: When true, the entry is deprecated: the generated C# constant + factory carry [Obsolete] and the TS constant + factory carry @deprecated. Additive — the entry is NEVER deleted. Deleting a deprecated (or non-deprecated) entry is a breaking change the JSON-diff gate fails.

deprecatedReason.description: Plain dev-facing English explaining why the code is deprecated; rendered into the [Obsolete("...")] message, the @deprecated JSDoc, and the changelog entry. NOT a TK key (developer-facing, not user-facing).

replacedBy.description: Wire code of the successor entry (e.g. RESOURCE_NOT_FOUND). Must reference a real, non-deprecated entry in the merged registry. Omit for pure retirement with no replacement.

sunset.description: ISO-8601 date for the future RFC 8594 Sunset response header. Edge-runtime-deferred: carried on the contract now, consumed by the Edge response middleware when it exists. Inert until then.
